name: orqastudio
description: OrqaStudio governance integration for Claude Code — agent delegation, rule enforcement, skill injection, artifact validation, and process workflow.

skills.name: orqa
skills.description: Run OrqaStudio governance commands. Routes to subcommands: save, create, validate, and more.

skills.name: orqa-create
skills.description: Create a new governance artifact (task, epic, decision, rule, knowledge, etc.) via the OrqaStudio daemon.

skills.name: orqa-save
skills.description: Save current session context to governance artifacts via the OrqaStudio daemon.

skills.name: orqa-validate
skills.description: Validate governance artifacts against the composed plugin schema via the OrqaStudio daemon.

commands.name: orqa-save
commands.description: Save current session context to governance artifacts

resources.name: OrqaStudio Governance Knowledge
resources.description: Agent-optimized knowledge artifacts for governance workflows, rules, and methodology.
